title: Impact of Pharmacotherapy Management in Patients With Alzheimer's Disease

metadata.brief_title: Impact of Pharmacotherapy Management in Patients With Alzheimer's Disease
metadata.inclusion_criteria:
inclusion criteria: 

 Elderly patients who are assisted in CRIA, diagnosed with Alzheimer's in use of rivastigmine or donepezil or galantamine, assisted by the Program for special drugs. 

 Be resident in the city of Araraquara / SP 

 Accept part of pharmacotherapeutic follow-up; 

 Sign the Statement of Informed Consent Form (ICF).
metadata.brief_summary: In Brazil, patients with Alzheimer's disease (AD) receiving free drugs of government. Even having access to, little is known about the effectiveness, safety and adherence of drug therapy in this group of patients. The research aims to promote adherence and develop strategies to address Drug-Related Problems (DRP's) in AD patients elderly of reference centre for the Elderly of Araraquara. The clinical parameters will be assessed at the beginning and after the educational intervention period from April 2014 to April 2015.
